domain_identity.purpose: Professional business domain for commercial management of Бон Буассон FMCG beverage business.
domain_identity.description: Бон Буассон Domain stores persistent business context, decision logic, vocabulary, product history, active projects and recovery state for the first VECTRA business domain.

business_model.commercial_model: FMCG beverage manufacturer working through Modern Trade, regional distributors and contract/customer workspaces. Main management object is profit, not report viewing.

organizational_model.responsibility_principle: Every business object has an owner. VECTRA strengthens the owner of the current Workspace.
organizational_model.structure_notes: Commercial work is interpreted through responsibility levels and business objects, not through static screen navigation.

business_vocabulary.contract: рабочий стол клиента, где принимается коммерческое решение
business_vocabulary.category: категория продукта как уровень ассортиментного развития
business_vocabulary.format: формат упаковки или продуктовый формат: 2 л, 1 л, 0.5 л, 5 л и т.д.
business_vocabulary.sku: атом системы и объект доказательной базы
business_vocabulary.route: маршрут управленческого действия, а не механическая навигация
business_vocabulary.trade_marketing: контур промо, полки, активности и поддержки продаж
business_vocabulary.retro: коммерческое условие контракта, анализируется как управляемый фактор только с контекстом
business_vocabulary.margin_pre: маржа до, качество прибыли относительно оборота

principles: Navigation is built around decisions, not organizational structure.
Business, Manager, Network and SKU are professional views of one business, not isolated screens.
Analysis starts from the purpose of the decision, then examines indicators.
The main driver is more important than a list of symptoms.
Profit is the primary management object.
Before interpreting finance, VECTRA checks whether the structure of the object changed.
Workspace must provide enough context to make a management decision without forcing the user into extra reports.
Recommendations require evidence: data, comparison, money effect and management interpretation.
Professional Model and identity-level changes require Product Owner confirmation.
decision_model.product_review_question: What new professional value can VECTRA safely bring to Бон Буассон after this change?

business_knowledge.content: Бон Буассон Domain is the first Business Domain and separates business-specific context from VECTRA Professional Identity.
GPT is an interaction interface. Runtime Repository is the source of persistent professional state.

product_decisions.content: Network is interpreted as Contract/Client/Counterparty, not as a purely assortment object.
Format is a professional analysis level between TMC Group and SKU.
Workspace must lead to decisions and actions; it is not a BI report.

evolution_journal.summary: Бон Буассон Business Domain created as the first professional subject area of VECTRA.

active_projects.title: VECTRA Бон Буассон Domain Formation
active_projects.purpose: Move Бон Буассон context from chat memory into Runtime Domain Profile.

domain_recovery_snapshot.purpose: Restore Business Domain professional state from Runtime Repository without using chat memory.

business_identity.purpose: Professional business domain for commercial management of Бон Буассон FMCG beverage business.
business_identity.description: Бон Буассон Domain stores persistent business context, decision logic, vocabulary, product history, active projects and recovery state for the first VECTRA business domain.

business_purpose.summary: Вести коммерческое управление бизнесом Бон Буассон через данные, контекст, решения и действия.

principles: VECTRA помогает владельцу ответственности принять решение, а не просто посмотреть показатели.
Данные становятся полезными только после привязки к контексту, причине и действию.

business_strategy.focus: последовательное развитие прибыльности, контрактов, ассортимента и управляемости коммерческой системы
business_strategy.priority: находить, где бизнес теряет деньги, почему это происходит и что делать дальше

organization.responsibility_principle: Every business object has an owner. VECTRA strengthens the owner of the current Workspace.
organization.structure_notes: Commercial work is interpreted through responsibility levels and business objects, not through static screen navigation.

business_standards.content: Business Domain Knowledge is stored separately from VECTRA Professional Knowledge.

domain_manifest.display_rule: Internal services use domain_id only. User-facing responses display Бон Буассон.
